category_sources: source_facts.description says it validates container image structure; official GitHub README says Container Structure Tests validate container images.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Container Structure Tests; source_facts.name is container-structure-test.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes installation and test usage information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/GoogleContainerTools/container-structure-test, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README both describe validating container image structure and running tests via standalone binary or Docker image.
